reviews.review_description: The first time i played i had a very great time and some people help me but once i got off and tried to play it the next day it would not work and it loaded for a long time to only tell me that my access was univalible, I've tried to delete it and redownload it but it still would not work. overall great game for me to only play it for only for an hour

This game has awesome potential getting scrap is a lot easier than people think, the devourer is cool but takes like 10 years to beat and you get only fifty scrap and like 15 thousand gold, it isn't even enough to refill my minigum ammo. You can walk outside ten feet and collect like 70 scrap in the room before the boss with your bust. Dont get me wrong the game is awesoms but more needs to be added

This game is actually realy fun, i was bored one day and got this game because uncle steve played it, at first it didnt let me on but then after like an hour it finaly loaded and it was PEAK, if your looking for a shooter game with hand based movement with MECHS! Then il'd reccomend this to you

reviews.review_title: Its a good game theirs just one problem
reviews.review_description: I like the game and plan on to support it for a while i think the community in it is also good. I like how you don't have to fight people and instead you can go in the cage unlike some games soon as I spawn i die. I like the game but the problem for me is the loading it will load but wont stop loading or anything but usually i can get off and back on the game and it doesn't do it again but rather than that i got no problems with the game and I hope to see the game grow and get really good update.

The game is just another gorilla tag type game but this time you spend every second looking for scrap that barley spawns so you can get a mech that doesn’t offer anything new other than a light that takes years to turn on. The enemies are incredibly broken with having the worst hit boxes known to man and if you stop shooting at them for a single second they will regain all of their health instantly.  Movement is janky and the only “fun” part of the game is when you get to the worm boss and even then it’s tedious. 2/10 wouldn’t recommend

This game is very addicting and I love ￼exploring maps I also love how easy it is to learn how to play ￼ I also love the robots ￼ they’re very ￼cool there are so many more things I could say, but I won’t￼ bother saying ￼those overall this game is definitely five out of five 
￼

The ChicKing Dead citing its fun gameplay, mech features, and social aspects. While some praise the game's addictiveness and ease of learning, others mention areas for improvement, such as bug fixes, additional maps, and tweaks to certain mechanics. Overall, the game seems to offer an engaging experience, especially when played with friends!

I was￼ looking for a fun game to play with my friend and I found this it sounded really fun but it wasn’t I can’t find out how to play with my friend but it does sound awesome because chicken in a mecsuit

So the Game is great with all of its mechanics , guns and mechs.
Though the movement is very buggy and the enemies are weak it is great one of the only thing there is to fix is the size of the map because we only got three areas : Spawn,Poison acid and subway and only one boss with too many guns to fight with. 
The game would be a hell of a lot better if the map was like three times as big with multiple bosses

I saw some people say it was pay to win but that's why they added quests its not all grind and the quests help get me my mechanism in only like 20 mins cool boss fights i would get if you like action.
This game is the best game I’ve ever played in a really long time cause there’s not really good games out there and I think this one kind of stands out from the rest of them
It is not bad game, but it is still pretty fun, but they do need to fix some things going on with the mec because sometimes it goes too fast

Found this game while I was bored tried it out and loved it then I got my friend on and he loved it and we play together every weekend could use some more updates but this is a great game and if possible me and my friends will be play testers for you

developer_response.body:
Hello,
This is QU.

First of all, thank you very much for enjoying our game.
We are currently preparing content updates for you to enjoy.

Additionally, ChicKlings United, which serves as our tester group, will be recruiting soon.
You will be able to apply through the official CKD Discord, so please make sure to join.

The link is as follows: https://discord.gg/chickingdead
Thank you.

reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun! The intense chases and gameplay are different from lots of vr games. It's competitive mixed with fun to concoct the perfect game! The devs such a good job I can't wait to see more ❤ -FourCred100

This game is amazing to play with friends and never do you think your low on resources the adventure is fun and I like the mechs. I would recommend playing it with your friends. However I have two problems with it 1: the fishing is absolutely garbage it needs a rework it doesn’t even work half the time and casting the line takes five business days to even do. Even when you catch I fish you only get like 30 gold and no scraps. 2: needs more areas. This game currently has three areas they are fun (apart from the fishing) but they get repetitive real fast. It needs more maps to sustain players however the pvp area also may help with this problem as well

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’ll continue working hard to make CKD even better.

developer_response.body:
Hello, korson.traster
This is QU.

First of all, we sincerely apologize for any frustration you experienced while playing the game.
There are quests in place to help players get accustomed to CKD and work toward obtaining a Mech,
but we understand that this may not have been sufficient, so we are currently planning a more helpful and structured tutorial.

Additionally, we are also preparing improvements to the movement system so that it can feel more satisfying for players.
Thank you for your patience, and we appreciate you continuing to follow CKD’s progress.

developer_response.body:
Hello, PotatoNugget103
This is QU.

First of all, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced while playing CKD.

The Acid damage has already been adjusted and lowered.
As for Mech movement, this is currently our top priority, and we are actively working on improvements so that it feels smooth and natural to control.

We truly appreciate all of the other feedback you shared as well, and we will take it carefully into consideration.

We will continue doing our best to make CKD a game you can enjoy comfortably.
Thank you for your patience and continued support, and we hope you’ll keep an eye on us going forward.

developer_response.body:
Hello, i_get_spooked_easy
This is QU.

First of all, we apologize for the inconvenience you experienced while playing.
By completing the quests, you can obtain at least 80 Scrap. We are also currently preparing a revamp of the quest system to help players adapt to the game more comfortably.

For feedback regarding updates, please visit our official Discord (https://discord.gg/chickingdead) and share your thoughts with us.
We will continue striving to be CKD that always listens to our players’ voices.

Thank you.
